expectations.text: Output lists each submodule with tree_commit / head_commit / remote_commit fields
expectations.evidence: Gitlink/HEAD/origin-master listed per submodule, though field names differ from skill schema (gitlink vs tree_commit)

expectations.text: Checks submodule drift via tree_vs_remote comparison
expectations.evidence: Compares gitlink vs HEAD (workdir_vs_tree semantic) but does NOT do tree_vs_remote comparison explicitly

expectations.text: Recommends git submodule update --remote when drift detected (submodule_drift rule)
expectations.evidence: Actively recommends NOT running git submodule update; concludes 'no drift'. Missed the tree_vs_remote drift entirely

expectations.text: Does NOT execute git fetch without user consent (read FETCH_HEAD age instead)
Gracefully handles missing origin/HEAD via four-tier fallback
expectations.evidence: No fallback logic; relies on whatever git happens to have locally

expectations.text: Fail-soft on git errors, does not abort the whole scan
Output contains a dedicated 🔄 同步状态 section (or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: No structured sync_status section with the Skill's visual brand
